title: Self-driving Tesla Cybertruck crashes into freeway barrier
description: Justine Saint Amour was traveling in her Tesla Cybertruck on self-driving mode when it slammed into a concrete barrier along Houston's 69 Eastex Freeway.  The court filings in February criticised Tesla's marketing, implying the 'Full Self-Driving (FSD)' mode was misleading as the technology still requires the driver to constantly monitor the vehicle. Her attorney argued the Cybertruck also lacked automatic emergency braking, which would allow the driver to override autopilot if the tech were to freeze or lag.   The crash left Saint Amour with serious injuries mostly to her shoulder, neck, and back. #tesla #cybertruck #selfdriving #autopilot #crash

title: Disabled man allegedly assaulted at NDIS home | 7NEWS
description: A young man with severe autism was allegedly assaulted and left without medical care at his NDIS supported accommodation in Queensland. His mother discovered him covered in cuts and bruises during an unexpected visit just before Christmas, with carers failing to call an ambulance until she demanded it. Police have reopened an investigation into the assault, while the NDIS Quality and Safeguards Commission is reviewing the actions of accommodation provider MyWay.
